name: How much money can I get for machine accident injury from work?
description: Wage replacement (66 2/3%), medical, disability—value depends on injury severity.

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for machine accident injury from work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Wage replacement (66 2/3%), medical, disability—value depends on injury severity.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Benefits include 66 2/3% of average weekly wage (up to $1,200 max in Utah), medical bills, and permanent disability if applicable.** Settlements vary by injury severity, lost wages, future care[4]. Machinery cases often yield higher for amputations or PTSD. No-fault system caps but third-party adds value. Calculate with attorney.
